case_title: GEORGE MITRI VS. HEIDI PRATT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PRATT, HEIDI
DECLARATION SUSAN PARKINSON FILED RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITRI, GEORGE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PRATT, HEIDI
